pricing.title: Affordable plans for every budget
pricing.subtitle: Explore our range of pricing options designed to fit any budget, offering exceptional value and flexibility to meet your unique needs.
pricing.freeDescription: For public libraries, mosques and community spaces.
pricing.plusDescription: For restaurants, hotels and similar venues. Limited to 20 items.
pricing.premiumDescription: For restaurants and hotels. Unlimited items.
pricing.freeFeatures: Public libraries & mosques|Basic lost & found listing|Community support|Email support
pricing.plusFeatures: Restaurants & hotels|Up to 20 items|Real-time listing|Monthly reports|Email support
pricing.premiumFeatures: Restaurants & hotels|Unlimited items|Real-time listing|Priority support|Dedicated account manager
